entry.title: Where does the text for material group 1 to 5 is stored?
entry.content: Hello SAP community. As it says on the title, I've been wondering about where does the text for material group(namely MVGR1 up to MVGR5) is stored. I've been trying some via SE16N, but the MVGRs are all empty in the view as it shows in the screenshot I attached.

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Process Automation: Consume Integration Flows from SAP Integration Suite as Actions
entry.content:
@Karthik-Thiru 

Hello.

I appreciate your nice blog.

I'm interested in the connection between Integration Suite and Build Process Automation.

So I deployed Integration Flow same as yours and set up destination on BTP as instructed this help.

 

The destination configuration is as follows.

 

  • DesignTimeDestinations

Instance

 

 

  • RuntimeDestination

instance

However when tried to refer the integration flow from BPA > Connectors >  Actions > Choose an API Source > Integration Suite > Integration Flow, following error is displayed.

Error message

Failed to fetch the iFlow artifacts : The destination tried to provide authorization tokens but failed in all cases. This is most likely due to misconfiguration. Original error messages: Failed to create SSL connection

 

I also tried to add properties and change Authentication method but it didn't help.


[Question]

I'm sorry to bother you but could you possibly share the screenshot of your destinations, please?

 

Actually I can refer Integration Flow from Choose an API Source > API Specifications > Build from Scratch and it works.

However I could chose only Basic authentication and this security is safe enough.

Sorry for long question but I'd appreciate if you could reply.

entry.title: Re: What are the best practices for accessing files on an SAP S/4HANA system from SAP Cloud Integrat
entry.content:
Hi Mustafa,
The best approach is to expose the files on your S/4HANA (OP or Cloud Private Edition) via the SFTP server.
This solution allows S/4HANA to write the file using AL11 mapped directories and allows BTP Cloud Integration to connect using SAP Cloud Connector.

The second option will need custom code, if even possible to retrieve the file with the correct format and encoding (imagine a payment or other type of file where every character matters). Why complicate things with SAP printing capabilities?
In such a case where you are contemplating writing custom code, you can request a custom remote function module that, when called, retrieves the files from the specific directory and responds with the file in either STRING or BASE64, the FM can be called directly or through the Web Services Runtime (SRT).

The third option, which is SAP Edge Integration Cell using FILE ADAPTER, is an unknown as we don't know all the capabilities it will provide, but remember, EIC is running on a K8s cluster, so most likely, you will need to "Export NFS Shares", "Install NFS Client on K8s Nodes", "Create PV and PVC and mount to the Pods", on top of that consider Network Policies, control access between NFS server and the K8s cluster, everything running in managed environments, I am sure it will work, but it won't be "next-next-finish" wizard. (Honest opinion: I am looking forward to the EIC solution).

Best regards 🖖🏻

entry.title: Re: Running Revenue Recognition (EPMFC) in Higher WBS level
entry.content: Hello, There should be only one billing element under one project. And that one should be assigned with RA key. You can only revalue the one with RA key. BR, Owen

entry.title: Re: What is the name of the CDS that contains "Inventory Price" data in Public Cloud for d
entry.content: Added Finance tag, please remove tag SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.

entry.title: Re: What is the name of the CDS that contains "Inventory...
entry.content:
Hello,

There are multiple posts asking the same question.

The answer unfortunately is negative.

There is currently no such CDS view. This is due to current design and roadmap.

Best Regards,
Owen

entry.title: How to add a new Entity & navigation property to standard cds: A_PurchaseContract?
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am able to extend the CDS A_PurchaseContract with few loose field.  And this is working fine and getting visible on the table also.  Below is the cds code: 

 

@AbapCatalog.sqlViewAppendName: 'ZMMPURCEXT1'
@EndUserText.label: 'ZMM_PURC_EXT'
extend view A_PurchaseContract with ZMM_PURC_EXT 
association [1..1] to ZCDS_PURCHASEHEADER_LONGTEXT2 as _LongText
  on _LongText.PurchaseContract is not null
{
  _LongText.TextId ,
  _LongText.LongText
}

 

 

 

But, I need to extend the CDS A_PurchaseContract with a new EntitySet with the structure under a new Navigation Name: HdrText

 

 

 

HdrText:  [{
                LongTextId(C3),
                LongText(C50)
        }]

 

Kindly share the step-by-step approach on this.

Note: The class for your reference are:

* The main API is: API_PURCHASECONTRACT_SRV

 

Service: API_PURCHASECONTRACT_SRV
Classes: CL_API_PURCHASECONTRAC_DPC_EXT
         CL_API_PURCHASECONTRAC_MPC_EXT

 

Thanks,

Ramani Nagarajan

entry.title: Re: No funds center entered/derived in item XXXXXX (Error Message: FI313
entry.content:
Hi i am unable to post transaction in Tcode-FBCJ ,

No funds center entered/derived in item 00001 (MG01/16500001/)

Message no. FI313

Diagnosis

The Funds Management component is activated in company code MG01. Consequently, a funds center needs to be entered manually or derived by the system.

To derive a funds center, you can use the following elements: Company code MG01 and account 16500001, or CO object .

Procedure

Enter a funds center or do one of the following to ensure that the system can derive the funds center from the assignments available:

  • Assign a funds center in the commitment item master record
  • Assign a funds center to the CO object

help me solve this issue all the fund center related config is there!..

Thankyou in advance....

entry.title: Re: Assessment Cycle
entry.content:
Hi,

You can use T code - FAGLGA31

If you are in latest releases of SAP S/4HANA you can also use Universal allocation.

 

Regards,

Gavin.

entry.title: Re: How to attach custom F4 Search help in Manage Customer Line Items(F0711)
entry.content:
Hi,

1. Create a VH CDS view for F4 search help.

2. Expose the above CDS view in your redefined the standard OData service.

3. Create metadata extension which @Metadata.layer: #CUSTOMER, in there to add VH annotation for the custom field.

(small question: why don`t you use the 'Custom Field' app to add a custom field to app?)

BRs,

Archer

You can set this up in KE13

Refer below blog for details

Gavin.

entry.title: Re: Display G/L balances in FS10N transaction based on co...

Hi,

You can create Fiscal year variant using OB29

And assign it to your company code using OB37.

 

Regards,

Gavin.

entry.title: Re: Unintended reinstall of SSAM app
entry.content:
I have occasionally run into this as well but usually with other files.  I am not sure if anti-virus is triggering it or something else.  We are still investigating for a better solution.

When I run into it I typically stop and relaunch my client from my terminal window and usually that helps.  Only running one client at a time also seems to help but none of this is really scientific.

entry.title: SAPUI5 and OData v4: 404 errors thrown after deleting an entity in detail page
entry.content:
Hi all, we have a requirement for 2 detail pages for each entity. When we click on a row item in the list page, we navigate to detail page 1. On detail page 1, we have another button to view detail page 2. Hence the routing hierarchy is list page -> detail page 1 -> detail page 2. For both detail pages, we bind the entity to the view based on the tutorials like such

private onRouteMatched(event) {
    this.entityId = event.getParameter('arguments').objectId;
    const entityPath = `/${RESULT_ENTITY_NAME}(${this.entityId})`;
    this.getView().bindElement({
      path: entityPath,
      events: {
        dataReceived: async (event) => {
          const params = event.getParameters();
          if (params.error && 'status' in params.error && params.error.status === 404) {
            await this.getRouter().getTargets().display('notFound');
          }
        },
      },
    });
  }

As you can see, we will navigate to a not found page if a 404 error is thrown. The code above is the same for both detail pages.

We have a delete button only on detail page 1 for deleting this entity. After delete we will navigate to the list page. The problem comes when the user is at detail page 1, enters detail page 2, presses back to go back to detail page 1, then presses delete. For some reason, this triggers a 404 error in the element binding in detail page 2 and we navigate to the not found page, even though we have navigated to the list page already. If we were to press delete the first time we are on detail page 1 (i.e. we never navigated to detail page 2), the delete works perfectly fine (we navigate to the list page properly and stay on it).

I think the issue is with the binding we are doing in both detail pages, but I'm not sure how to work around it.

entry.title: Re: SAC Table - 3 Dimension Rows are merged to 1 Row automatically without hierarchy?
entry.content: Is it a acquired model or a live BW model?

entry.title: Re: Connect Analysis for Office (AfO) with SAP Analytics...
entry.content:
Hi Eric,

SAC with AfO currently only support the classic account model. Therefore, you can't use models of the new model type (model with measures).

Just cross check once models that you are expecting to see in SAC for AFO are classic account models.

Best Regards,

Basavaraj

entry.title: Re: Connect Analysis for Office (AfO) with SAP Analytics...
entry.content:
Hi eric2357, 

    The list you see as attached only contains acquired model with type classic account model. The new model type is not support by AO yet. I guess that's why you only see two. 

  https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ANALYSIS_OFFICE_CLOUD/b25c777a2c8c4e3da2f472cce24f289c/22dde04d4598450189afc33838c13575.html

Best regards, William

entry.title: How to Automatically Delete EC Alerts when Contract End Date is Emptied?
entry.content:
Hi All,

We have a business rule which creates EC alerts when a fixed term employee reaches contract end date.

The problem is that the alerts doesn't automatically get deleted when the contract end date value is emptied (when employee becomes permanent).

What is the possible workaround? It seems that the Alert.Delete Old Pending Alert Flag works only if there is a new alert to insert (e.g. new Contract End Date is entered) but not if Contract End Date is removed.

Thank you.

 

Kind regards,

Gem

entry.title: I need to send an invoice in both Excel and CSV formats via email.
entry.content:
Dear experts,

The current code snippet is sending e mail in xls format. Now the requirement is I need to send email in both Excel and CSV formats.

code:

"merging header and item rows
IF lv_header IS NOT INITIAL AND lv_item IS NOT INITIAL .
CONCATENATE lv_header cl_abap_char_utilities=>newline lv_item INTO lv_excel.
ENDIF.

"converting to binary
TRY.
cl_bcs_convert=>string_to_solix(
EXPORTING
iv_string = lv_excel
iv_codepage = '4103' "suitable for MS Excel, leave empty
iv_add_bom = 'X' "for other doc types
IMPORTING
et_solix = lt_binary_content ).
CATCH cx_bcs.
MESSAGE e005.
ENDTRY.

"add attchement
CALL METHOD lo_document->add_attachment
EXPORTING
i_attachment_type = 'xls'
i_attachment_subject = lv_subject
i_att_content_text = lt_cont_text
i_att_content_hex = lt_binary_content.

* add document to send request
CALL METHOD lo_send_request->set_document( lo_document ).

Please guide me how to do this or if you have any sample code for help.

Thank you.

entry.title: Is it possible to switch the display of a dimension in a chart from ID to description using script?

entry.title: Assistance Required for Comparing same Column Values in SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
Hello Community,


We are currently facing a challenge in comparing values within the same column in SAP Analytical Applications and model scripting in SAP Analytics Cloud. Specifically, we have a dataset with a column called "Vehicle Speed". Our requirement is to compare each value in this column with the subsequent value (i.e., the 1st value with the 2nd, the 2nd with the 3rd, and so on). Whenever a specified condition is met during these comparisons, we need to create an additional measure column to capture these instances as '1' or '0'.

Despite our efforts to implement this in SAC Analytical Applications and Model Scripting, we have not been successful.

Please find below image for data.

As the highlighted data increments from 0 to 20, we need to track instances where the next record is greater than or equal to 20. For this, we require an additional measure column to count such instances.


Kindly help me with above requirement.

Thanks,
Urvish

kind regards 

Volker

entry.title: Can we replicate data from ABAP CDS View having input parameter through SDI(Smart Data Integration)
entry.content:
I am trying to replicate data from ABAP CDS view which is having input parameter to HANA DB through SDI (Smart Data Integration). We created remote source using ABAP Adapter in SAP HANA and created virtual table on top of it.

ABAP CDS View with Input Parameter(Document Number)

 

When we do SELECT on that virtual table we get below error.

When you add the virtual table in flowgraph, the document number input parameter is not coming up.

 

 

Is it possible to replicate data from ABAP CDS View using Flowgraph? If no, what are the options to replicate the data from parameterized ABAP CDS View to SAP HANA ?

 

@GNS @GNS1 

Thank You

Best Regards,

Ajinkya Jadhav

ABAP Development  SAP HANA smart data integration SAP Landscape Transformation replication server

entry.title: Re: High Latency (Geo Satellite Network) on HANA
entry.content: You should first try to optimize HANA performance like Data Compression, Parallel Processing, Network Optimization, Delta Merge, Data Partitioning... Use the of HANA built-in performance analysis tools to identify and resolve performance bottlenecks.

entry.title: Re: Import data from AWS S3 to HANA Cloud
entry.content: The certificate you need is the SSL certificate for the AWS S3 endpoint you are connecting to. This is not something you generate, but something provided by AWS.

entry.title: Re: SAP HANA DB - Transport/Package Custom Schema and underlying custom table
entry.content: Did you already try HALM? Transporting custom tables and schemas in SAP HANA DB can as I know be done using the SAP HANA Application Lifecycle Management (HALM) tool. This tool allows you to manage the lifecycle of SAP HANA database artifacts and applications.

entry.title: Re: Import data from AWS S3 to HANA Cloud
entry.content: ok but how to get it ?

entry.title: Re: DP Agent installation and configuration issues
entry.content:
Based on the error messages, it seems like there are issues with the network connection between the DP Agent and the HANA system.

You should be ensure, that the DP Agent server can reach the HANA system over the network. You can do this by pinging the HANA system from the DP Agent server. If the ping fails, there might be a network issue that needs to be resolved. Firewalls can sometimes block the necessary ports for the DP Agent to communicate with the HANA system. Ensure that the necessary ports are open on both the DP Agent server and the HANA system. Another point is to check the DP Agent is correctly configured to connect to the HANA system. This includes checking the HANA system's hostname, port, and credentials in the DP Agent configuration and the DP Agent logs can provide more detailed information about the issue. Look for any error messages in the logs that might indicate what the problem is.

entry.title: How to handle References in EHS Rule Editor
entry.content:
Hi All,

I try to build a rule which

  • check if a dedicated Reference is set
  • Replace this reference by a other one or
  • to delete the specific one, and set a new Reference

But I'm facing several problems, as there could be more then one Reference in ESTRR. All try's I did (also with ANY) did not succeed. Unfortunately the manual is not that helpful explaining how to handle those entries, so I hope someone has may an working example which explain how to work with this part.

entry.title: Generating E-way Bills under Bill to and Ship to Scenario
entry.content:
I have Scenario, Sold to party and Bill to party is from Hyderabad(A), Ship to party is in Maharashtra (B) And Plant is in Maharashtra (C). So invoice generated with IGST. But from GST side we are getting error as, 'For the Intra state transaction, IGST amount is not applicable; only CGST and SGST amount are applicable for the document.

So, I think it is the case of E-way Bills under Bill to and Ship to Scenario. Where  C create Invoice against the A, and A create Invoice against the B. So, How it is to be adopted in SAP. Also, help me if I am taking wrong understanding.

entry.title: Re: [SAP BTP Onboarding Series]Joule – Getting Started with Document Grounding for Your SAP SFSF

One clarification:

" Document Content: Plain Text (tables and images are not supported)"

Doe it mean it can't extract info from tables and images? Or does it mean the uploaded documents should not contain tables and images otherwise an error pops up?

entry.title: Re: Asynchronous code execution using ABAP Cloud
entry.content: Thanks @mario-dc for the great blog. Really helpful having all the options laid out simply. Looking forward to the upcoming enhancements

entry.title: Re: out of memory while calling a procedure from xs job
entry.content:
The error message indicates that the procedure is trying to allocate more memory than is available. This could be due to the fact that the XS job and the SQL editor have different memory limits. When you run a procedure from the SQL editor, it is executed in the context of your user session, which might have a higher memory limit. When the procedure is run from an XS job, it is executed in the context of the XS engine, which might have a lower memory limit.

Try to reduce the amount of data that your procedure needs to process at once. This could involve breaking down the procedure into smaller parts, or using more efficient SQL queries but always test any changes in a controlled environment before applying them to your production system.

entry.title: Re: How to schedule application jobs from a RAP-based business object
entry.content:
Thanks @Andre_Fischer for this, I'm loving all the working example repos you have been posting, it's great being able to just pull them into our system so easily and try it all out. Also good seeing how you deal with the items not supported in abap git 🙂 

Cheers

Chris

entry.title: Is it possible to edit the description in the down payment request?
entry.content:
By mistake, wrong item description was maintained in the Down payment request. How can we modify the description here? 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to edit the description in the down pa...
entry.content: If the status of the down payment request is posted, then the system will not allow to change the item description. As the status of the down payment request is posted (which means it is not paid yet) , this document can be deleted and create a fresh document with correct details.

entry.title: Removed extension while upgrade to 2211.24
entry.content:
hi team, 

 

we are now doing upgrade from DIGITS to DIGITS.24 (latest version) 

unfortunately, we aware that from DIGITS.24 , the extension 'sapproductconfigsomservices' and 'sapproductconfigsombol' are getting removed, and we do use it in the project, 

 

the way that we think about is to copy the entire extensions from DIGITS.23 into our repo in order to keep it, but we are not sure if this is a good idea, or is there any other new extension that we can use? how can we handle this case ?

 

thanks, 

Best


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Removed extension while upgrade to 2211.24
entry.content:
When an extension is deleted (de-released), it is removed from SAP Commerce and no longer shipped with the software. Components marked as deprecated continue to be maintained until they are deleted in a future release. You can continue to use an older release where they have not been deleted, however you may be prevented from deploying new builds of older versions once those versions are no longer supported in cloud environments. Please refer this help page for more details - https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_COMMERCE_CLOUD_PUBLIC_CLOUD/12be4ac419604b01aabb1adeb2c4c8a2/8bb15ed586691014a948d1553f4947cf.html?locale=en-US&q=deprecation%20status

There is also this KBA that explains FAQs on the deprecation -SAP Commerce Cloud Accelerator Storefront Deprecation - FAQ

entry.title: No delivery-relevant items in order xxxx, order type ZNWO
entry.content:
No delivery-relevant items in order xxxx, order type xxxx

Message No. VL455

Sale order created from va01

Delivery creation error.

entry.title: Re: Import data from AWS S3 to HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Please check, if this is working via Google Chrome:

1. Open web browser and navigate to your S3 bucket URL. It should be something like `https://s3.amazonaws.com/your-bucket-name`.
2. Click on the lock icon in the address bar, then click on "Certificate".
3. In the Certificate window, go to the "Details" tab and click on "Copy to File...".
4. Follow the Certificate Export Wizard to save the certificate as a .CER file.

Once you have the certificate, you can upload it to HANA Cloud PSE as described in the SAP HANA Cloud documentation.

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere Data Validations
entry.content:
Hello,

thank you for the detailed explanation!
A nice Feature if it's capabilitys increase and there are no Restricions.

Is it planned to make this Feature (that you did manually) a part of a Taskchain ? 
There is no Point in further increasing the Features of supported Checks if you have to do it manually for every View! No one will ever do that ;).

Any of your view's sources is not replicated to SAP Datasphere.

-> SAP always promotes that the Data has not to persisted again within the DSP.
How come that you release a Feature that does not support the Federate Approach ? 
Is this planned?

entry.title: Re: SAP GROUP REPORTING - CUSTOM CALCULATION FOR AMORTIZATION
entry.content: Could you provide the script? Reclassification rules or custom task could be an option depending on what you find in the script.

entry.title: Re: Integrate SAP S/4HANA authorizations into SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
Hello @BenedictV ,

the reasons are peformance and filtering of relevant authorization values.

If you integrate all authorization values from the source system there will be loads of data which will at some point impact performance. And secondly you want to control exactly which authorization values are used in SAP Datasphere.

Best regards,
Jens

entry.title: Re: Zipping multiple files from SFTP to SFTP in one folder
entry.content:
Hi MAVR

Thank you for the reply.

Can you please elaborate, how you configured the SFTP-poll to read multiple files, because in my case only one of the four files is getting processed.

Regards 

Shreyas

entry.title: Re: [SAP BTP Onboarding Series]Joule – Getting Started with Document Grounding for Your SAP SFSF
entry.content:
Thanks, Steven. I appreciate the feedback. 

The document may have the tables and images, but our pipelines do not read the data. If you ask questions, it will respond that it cannot find the requested data. 

Regards,

Nagesh

entry.title: Can Build Process Automation Action treat Binary File?
entry.content:
Hello Experts.

I made an Integration Flow as This Blog.

The API has following parameters.

Parameter NameType
containernamequery parameterstring
Storage Account Namequery parameterstring
FileRequest Bodybinary file

In order to call this integration flow from Action of SAP Build Process Automation, I created an Action from Connector > Actions > Create > Build from Scratch.

And I defined API as following screenshot.

I enter connectivity and basic authentication information manually and it works fine

 

 

However there's no field to put the binary file to Request Body on Test Input Values.

Besides I called this API from "Automation" from process and there's no field for "file" of http body as well.

[Question]

Isn't there any way to deliver a binary file to HTTP Request body of API in SAP Build Process Automation?

I'm wondering that the values that can be handled in HTTP Request Body is only JSON format?

 

[What I investigated]

I referred this HELP but there's no information about binary file.

entry.title: Re: SAPUI5 and OData v4: 404 errors thrown after deleting...
entry.content: Found the fix. The problem was after delete, I called `model.refresh()` (in the detail page). I removed the line and added `table.getBinding('items').refresh()` inside my Main controller's `router.onPatternMatched` callback instead

entry.title: Re: How to schedule application jobs from a RAP-based business object
entry.content:
@Andre_Fischer , I'm experimenting on SAP S/4HANA 2023 (on-premises).

P.S. Thanks for the tip about background processing framework. I'll check it out, but nonetheless I'm curious about the application job component and how to make it work.

entry.title: How do I configure automated financial closing in SAP S/4HANA?
entry.content: I'm trying to set up automated financial closing in SAP S/4HANA. Could someone guide me through the configuration steps or share any resources that could help?

entry.title: Does HANA support swpm parallel import of table splits
entry.content:
Hi,

For Table split preparation in swpm, SAP guide states that

"Parallel data export of a table is supported by all database platforms but not parallel data import. When the target database platform does not support the parallel data import, the migration monitor has to be configured in the way that the data import processes the packages are sequentially."

Question is: Does HANA db support parallel data import from table splits ? e.g. Once the export is completed, then Can 6 splits of BSEG-1 to BSEG-6 or CDPOS-1 to 6 table be imported in parallel or out of sequence ? since multiple parallel import jobs would be available ? Will it cause any problem ?

Thanks / regards.

entry.title: S/4HANA Cash Management Exclude Flow Types
entry.content:
We have recently carried out an S/4HANA Bronwfield conversion for our customers and reconfigured the cash management system.

We are currently checking the data consistency in the old and new systems.

During the liquidity forecast, we noticed that the customs duty costs (Its a condition type) for a Purchase Order were included in the forecast under S/4HANA (TC: FF7BN).

In the old system (TC:FF7B), customs duty costs are not included in the liquidity forecast. So we have here a difference.

Is there a way to filter or exclude certain movement types / movement categories like 900021 which is the Flow Type for custom duty costs?

Thanks in advance

 

Best regards

entry.title: Email Notification template setting in S4HANA
entry.content:
I want to send email notification after Purchase Requisition creation in s4hana.

I copy predelivered email template SWF_CRT_NOTIFIY_RECIPIENTS and create custom template name YY1_02000458_CRT_19.

I want to know which settings are needed to get email notification of this template.

Best Regards,

KhaingZin

entry.title: Re: Message size limit in sap cloud integration
entry.content:
Hi,

You can refer to this note https://me.sap.com/notes/0003262232 for the recommendations around message size.

entry.title: Re: Supply Protection on the Level of the Storage Location
entry.content: With OP2023 FPS2 Segments are also supported as Planning Level. This is an interesting feature, if e.g. different quality-grades are protected.

entry.title: Re: EWM Performance issue due to growth of table /SCWM/ST...
entry.content:
Hi Shiv,

which version/Core you are running? Have you checked the "source" of your table growth? Are those zero line entries? Then check out following note:

2875719 - Deleting zero quantity entries from /LIME/NQUAN

Kr

Chris

entry.title: Re: Remove yellow drill down arrows in query
entry.content: You can simply do it like this: T0.[DocNum] as Documentnumber

entry.title: Re: Delivery has not yet been put awayMessage No. VLMOVE029
entry.content:
Hi @Hitheshrao 

Your inbound delivery is putaway relevant, thus you can't post goods receipt unless the delivery Putaway Status = C. In other words the putaway quantity needs to be equal to the delivery quantity, not necessairly zero as in the example below, but equal nevertheless:

In the simplest approach you can maintain the putaway quantity manually in VL32N. Alternatively the putaway process is executed in EWM or LE-WM. You have not provided any details, so I can't tell.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: S/4HANA Cash Management Exclude Flow Types
entry.content:
To exclude customs duty costs from the liquidity forecast in S/4HANA:

Access Settings: Use transaction code SPRO to open the Customizing Implementation Guide (IMG).

Modify Cash Management: Navigate to Financial Supply Chain Management > Cash and Liquidity Management > Cash Management > Liquidity Forecast > Define Liquidity Item Determination.

Adjust Flow Type: Locate flow type 900021 (customs duty costs) and adjust its settings to exclude it from the forecast.

Test and Validate: Run the liquidity forecast to ensure customs duty costs are excluded and validate the changes against the old system.

 

I hope this helps!

entry.title: Re: Funds Management Accounting transaction is not consid...
entry.content:
Hi Rajeev,

first thing which comes to my mind and you could check is if EAFM flag is set as active in table TRWCA with a year like 2999. Check through transaction SM30.

Please see the following blog post as well as note 3071181.

PSM-FM (Funds Management) tables are not being upd... - SAP Community

Best wishes!

entry.title: The mature, comprehensive SAP mobile experience is the best way to enjoy SAP
entry.content:
Spatial computing at work: SAP apps for Apple Vision Pro takes mobile business on step further

As "the new VP", I thought some time about whether to start my first blog post with a provocative question. Preferably something to do with change and artificial intelligence. And why you should expect exactly that from me, but perhaps also a bit of continuity.

But maybe I'll make it easier: Are you reading this blog post on your company cell phone? Perhaps on your way to the office? Are there any business apps on this device that you recently used? For example, to request a day's vacation? Approve the new laptop of one of your employees? Or get an itinerary recommended for your next customer workshop overseas?

If not, what needs to change so that you can perform as many of your work-related tasks on your mobile device –– as you have long been accustomed to in your private life?

I should briefly introduce myself: My name is Markus Kopf, head of the central Mobile Experience & Engineering unit at SAP. I am the new Vice President.

Presenting at the SAP Mobile Day in Frankfurt

Perhaps you even met me at one of our customer conferences we had in the previous weeks, the very big SAP Sapphire in Orlando  and the not so big, but slightly more personal SAP Mobile Day in Frankfurt. If you’ve not met so far, let me assure you: Yes, as I am the “new guy”, I will be talking about some things from now on that are quite new, here in this blog and soon also on other channels. I will also be speaking about AI, of course –– since we are in the middle of the user interface paradigm shift.

Augmented reality with SAP Product Model Viewer and central access to SAP workflows with SAP Mobile Start shown on SAP Sapphire

But I won't repeat the somewhat worn-out phrase that the world is constantly changing and so need you. On the contrary: Regarding our mobile strategy, we at SAP together with our customers and partners have been consistently putting a lot of things together and doing them right so that you – that all of us – can work better. We have frequently introduced new mobile solutions, emphasizing adaptability and ease-of-use – so that SAP customers and users can receive highest degrees of reliability and stability from us, even if and especially when things change abruptly.

We took the time to evolve, as our management has, which is why I was lucky enough to succeed Florian Heretsch after a further step in his career. At the same time, as of course everything is changing all the time, and our expectations towards user-friendly technology have evolved massively. Mobile devices have become an integral part of our lives, even though recent studies still show that in business environments – apart from communication and a few office tasks – mobile usage is still lagging behind its possibilities.

I’ve spent a couple of years in mobile development units at some large and smaller companies. There and at SAP we have been talking about using mobile experiences anywhere and any time since a while now.

But,

  • with the tremendous progress we have now made at SAP in cloud development with the right platform (SAP BTP) in place,
  • with the integration of a wealth of secure business data and process expertise that is unparalleled in the industry,
  • with the new possibilities of Business AI, such as SAP Joule, recently released by SAP,
  • with the advent of spatial computing and the – indeed – revolutionary changes there regarding mixed-reality environments,

we can now take better advantage than ever before of what the latest generations of devices from all manufacturers have to offer.

And that’s what our story is about:

The most comprehensive mobile business package is here –– right now. And it's the fastest way to get the best out of technologies such as business cloud and AI applications for you.

We want to show you what’s possible today

Showcases at the SAP Mobile Day 2024

Last month, more than 40 SAP customers and partners gathered at the third SAP Mobile Day in Frankfurt, Germany. Many brand names have been there that would be familiar to you and that represent several industries with different requirements.

An event of this size makes it possible to exchange experiences in greater detail. It’s a little below the flying height and enables a slightly different angle than what is shown at international events, what makes those smaller meetings as important for me as the big ones. While there’s obviously no conference anymore where we can’t talk about AI, the perspective at the Mobile Day was about what’s possible today when you’re out there, on the road, on a construction site, remotely working wherever this might be, hands-free if needed. These are the sometimes tough, sometimes challenging conditions where new and evolved partnerships allow us to offer effective business apps such as SAP Mobile Start for rugged devices as well as latest spatial computing technology such as the new Apple Vision Pro.

The premise, that all those different scenarios and industries brings together, is: Access to business workflows and business data becomes an experience that is supportive and approachable for everyone. Data from a facility goes directly into the SAP system, for example, or people are assisted on-site by our asset management solution.

The SAP Sapphire slogan 2024: An important part of it are our mobile offerings

Yes, for me it’s that simple: Mobile devices provide the best and most accessible interface for using the latest and best of what’s possible with SAP. Whether it’s a phone, a watch, or glasses. Mobile devices are the tools to work with todays and future AI models anywhere.

Personally, SAP Sapphire and SAP Mobile Day have been premieres for me in my new role. During demos and presentations, I still found that for many people it's an eye-opener how quickly and easily certain tasks can be completed on a corporate mobile device, just as they know it from the apps they use every day. Not to mention more complex tasks. Until recently, people just didn’t expect things like procurement or approval workflows to be just a matter of taps or natural language commands. Now, with on-device AI and SAP Joule, the power in your hand is even increasing.

Latest generation mobile devices and spatial computing provide the most tangible experience for AI-infused business applications

On the other hand, I was not only able to be a speaker and host on these events. I was also able to experience both events in many individual discussions, as a participant, a listener. I saw from an audience perspective what SAP is achieving today together with great partners and customers such as Apple and Samsung. How, with our SAP Business Technology Platform, we are simultaneously offering many others the opportunity to further simplify specific work processes and make them more mobile through in-house development.

This unified and coordinated overall picture, from mobile development to the finished app on a wide variety of devices, is what we do better and more consistently today than ever before: Mobile with SAP not as a detached “idea” that is subject to constant change, but as a comprehensive, very tangible and integrated solution to benefit from the experience of a modern SAP – that will truly change how we work.

Further links

sap.com/mobile

entry.title: Re: Connect Analysis for Office (AfO) with SAP Analytics...
entry.content: Thank you very much, thats it!

entry.title: Re: Valuated stock becomes negative Message No:M7314
entry.content:
Hello @janusap 

You said "material type was defined as non-valuated initially and was then turned into valuated while we already had stock".

If I understand that correctly, material type value management has been activated, when stock existed, i.e. stock was not zero. You should not have done that. The stock should have been zeroed before value management activation.

Now, you have a stock quantity, but not value and the material is value managed. Therefore when 201 movement is posted, the system tries to reduce both stock quantity and value. The stock value being zero, is getting negative during the posting, hence the error. 

I think you have two ways to rectify the situation:

  1. Do it by the book - deactivate value management; reduce stock to zero; activate value management; bring the stock back (that will bring back both stock quantity and value)
  2. Shortcut - add the missing stock value with MR22

Make sure to consult your FI guys to define an offsetting account for stock value posting.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: Back to basics with SAP Cloud Application Programming Model (CAP) - part 17
entry.content:
• This week's SAP Developer News https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=M2apymZS-Ks
  • SAP's Open Source Manifesto https://github.com/SAP/open-source-manifesto
  •

entry.title: Re: Stock not updating in ECC from EWM
entry.content:
Hello @kraghavanbindhu 

The sequence of actions in EWM after goods receipt is as follows:

  1. a PPF action is scheduled and executed to send a delivery confirmation message to ERP
  2. the action creates a SMQ1 entry in EWM
  3. the entry is processed in EWM and send over to ERP as SMQ2 entry.

So you don't see SQM@ entry for the delivery in ERP, check for SMQ1 entries in EWM and make sure the PPF action is executed for the inbound delivery in EWM.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: Funds Management Accounting transaction is not consid...
entry.content: Depending on your scenario entries for FMBD, FMCE and FMRE can also be relevant.

entry.title: Re: P2P controlling analysis in Sap Process Insights
entry.content: Thank you for the reply Volker.

entry.title: Re: P2P controlling analysis in Sap Process Insights
entry.content: The reuirement is to have details of controlling object when download data for PO item creation (with account assignment) to invoice PPI. I noticed that controlling data details are not included as part of this analysis. I'll take a look to KFFI002003-05 or eventually move this analyssis on Process Intelligence.

entry.title: Re: Syntax error in ABAP SELECT statement - OFFSET is invalid ( due to grammar)
entry.content:
Hi Sandra
Thank you for your answer.
Yes, I did. I was in doubt how this is can be true.
Just confirmed.
Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Can we re-purpose an existing company code's bank acc...
entry.content:
Hi @R_Pooja， Do you mean you want to assign several house bank accounts with different company codes to one bank account? I wonder why you would prefer this approach instead of creating a new bank account. Could you please share more information about the use case here?

Technically it's possible via the message control configuration, as you mentioned. But there are also limitations as documented in the configuration help, for example, the following apps are not supported in this setup:

    • Monitor Instant Balances
    • Bank Statement Monitor - Intraday
    • Manage Cash Pools (Version 2) for cash pools with the service provider Company - Time- Dependent 

FIN Cash Management

entry.title: Re: Table fields alignment using Row Component in SAP Build
entry.content:
Simply select your row, then on the right hand "Layout", and then you will see cell structure. Click each cell symbol in the row structure picture and define it's width as fixed value. Do the same with your header row.

Please note - the header row will not be aligned with the list rows anyway when the scroll view shows the scroll bar. But at least all the list rows will be aligned with each other.

entry.title: Error while Enable the Audit Database logs
entry.content:
Dear Experts,
 
While creating the Audit log policy we are facing error message as attached in the screenshot.
 
Please check & revert with the workaround.
 
Thanks in advance.
 

 

Regards,
Shubham Bulley

entry.title: Re: Performance Status: Rejected
entry.content:
@Firi_1 

Please remove below highlighted button permission in Manage Template for Employee in the route step which you dont want to see this and this will fix the issue, please mark this as answer so others can get benefits from the same.

Thanks

Mridul

entry.title: Re: Password change by BAPI_USER_CHANGE
entry.content:
Hello,
I am not so familiar with the CUA stuff. However, did you evalute the RETURN table after the BAPI call for useful information? 
Kind regards
Jan

entry.title: Re: P2P controlling analysis in Sap Process Insights
entry.content: We can't provide all CO details in the respective Flow, as one PO item can have multiple account assignments. The suggested PPIs always focus on one account assignment object at a time.

entry.title: JSON fromat Error
entry.content:
Hi Team,
Expected Json format is like Below ( this format is when i run in the postman showing successful) 

 
{
    "sequenceNumber": ,
    "uhlId": " ",
    "dataType": " ",
    "plantCodeLetter": " ",
    "plantIdentifier": " ",
    "fileCreationDate": " ",
    "fileCreationTime": " ",
    "sourceSystem": " ",
    "programVersionOne": " ",
    "programVersionTwo": "string",
    "programVersionThree": "string",
    "tt971Date": " ",
    "tt971Time": " ",
    "completeDataLoad": " ",
    "payload": [ " "
]
} 
As per the expectation i have Created structure Like below

After run the interface also  Json format convertion also coming in SAP PO  like below
{"sequenceNumber": X,"uhlId":"XXX,"dataType":"XXXX","plantCodeLetter":"string","plantIdentifier":"XXX","fileCreationDate":20230127,"fileCreationTime":20230127,"sourceSystem":"XXXX","programVersionOne":"YYYYY","programVersionTwo":"string","programVersionThree":"string","tt971Date":20230127,"tt971Time":"00000","completeDataLoad":"00000","payload":[ " " ]
}
 looks like both are same, But when I use this json format in the Postman tool it is showing as 400 BAD request

Could you please let me know , what changes i have to do,

entry.title: Re: Meet your new friend EMIS: Event Mesh in SAP Integration Suite
entry.content:
Hello,

for a connection with S/4HANA 2022 onPremise I need the service key from EMIS. Unfortunately the service key from the SAP Integration Suite instance does not work.
